query: What is in the reporting copybook CVTRA07Y?

results.name: CVTRA07Y
results.summary: copybook CVTRA07Y in CVTRA07Y.cpy. comment hint: Reporting data structure for transaction report.
results.content:
*****************************************************************         
      *    Reporting data structure for transaction report                      
      *****************************************************************         
       01  REPORT-NAME-HEADER.                                                  
           05  REPT-SHORT-NAME                  PIC X(38) VALUE                 
           'DALYREPT'.                                                          
           05  REPT-LONG-NAME                   PIC X(41) VALUE                 
           'Daily Transaction Report'.                                          
           05  REPT-DATE-HEADER                 PIC X(12) VALUE                 
           'Date Range: '.                                                      
           05  REPT-START-DATE                  PIC X(10) VALUE SPACES.         
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(04) VALUE ' to '.         
           05  REPT-END-DATE                    PIC X(10) VALUE SPACES.         
                                                                                
       01  TRANSACTION-DETAIL-REPORT.                                           
           05  TRAN-REPORT-TRANS-ID             PIC X(16).                      
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(01) VALUE SPACES.         
           05  TRAN-REPORT-ACCOUNT-ID           PIC X(11).                      
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(01) VALUE SPACES.         
           05  TRAN-REPORT-TYPE-CD              PIC X(02).                      
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(01) VALUE '-'.            
           05  TRAN-REPORT-TYPE-DESC            PIC X(15).                      
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(01) VALUE SPACES.         
           05  TRAN-REPORT-CAT-CD               PIC 9(04).                      
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(01) VALUE '-'.            
           05  TRAN-REPORT-CAT-DESC             PIC X(29).                      
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(01) VALUE SPACES.         
           05  TRAN-REPORT-SOURCE               PIC X(10).                      
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(04) VALUE SPACES.         
           05  TRAN-REPORT-AMT                  PIC -ZZZ,ZZZ,ZZZ.ZZ.            
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(02) VALUE SPACES.         
                                                                                
       01  TRANSACTION-HEADER-1.                                                
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(17) VALUE                 
           'Transaction ID'.                                                    
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(12) VALUE                 
           'Account ID'.                                                        
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(19) VALUE                 
           'Transaction Type'.                                                  
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(35) VALUE                 
           'Tran Category'.                                                     
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(14) VALUE                 
           'Tran Source'.                                                       
           05  FILLER                           PIC X VALUE SPACES.             
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(16) VALUE                 
           '        Amount'.                                                    
                                                                                
       01  TRANSACTION-HEADER-2  PIC X(133) VALUE ALL '-'.                      
                                                                                
       01  REPORT-PAGE-TOTALS.                                                  
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(11) VALUE                 
           'Page Total'.                                                        
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(86) VALUE ALL '.'.        
           05  REPT-PAGE-TOTAL                  PIC +ZZZ,ZZZ,ZZZ.ZZ.            
                                                                                
       01  REPORT-ACCOUNT-TOTALS.                                               
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(13) VALUE                 
           'Account Total'.                                                     
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(84) VALUE ALL '.'.        
           05  REPT-ACCOUNT-TOTAL               PIC +ZZZ,ZZZ,ZZZ.ZZ.            
                                                                                
       01  REPORT-GRAND-TOTALS.                                                 
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(11) VALUE                 
           'Grand Total'.                                                       
           05  FILLER                           PIC X(86) VALUE ALL '.'.        
           05  REPT-GRAND-TOTAL                 PIC +ZZZ,ZZZ,ZZZ.ZZ.            
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
      *
      * Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-15-g27d6c6f-68 Date: 2022-07-19 23:16:01 CDT
      *
results.comments: Reporting data structure for transaction report

results.name: 1120-WRITE-HEADERS
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 1120-WRITE-HEADERS (lines 324-342)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC
results.summary: paragraph 1120-WRITE-HEADERS in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1120-WRITE-HEADERS.                                                      
           MOVE REPORT-NAME-HEADER TO FD-REPTFILE-REC                           
           PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC                                        
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNTER                                             
                                                                                
           MOVE WS-BLANK-LINE TO FD-REPTFILE-REC                                
           PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC                                        
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNTER                                             
                                                                                
           MOVE TRANSACTION-HEADER-1 TO FD-REPTFILE-REC                         
           PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC                                        
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNTER                                             
                                                                                
           MOVE TRANSACTION-HEADER-2 TO FD-REPTFILE-REC                         
           PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC                                        
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNTER                                             
                                                                                
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN (lines 430-447)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0300-TRANTYPE-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT TRANTYPE-FILE                                             
           IF  TRANTYPE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING TRANSACTION TYPE FILE'                    
               MOVE TRANTYPE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
